text: I can't log in to my account. Password reset didn't work.
I’m so frustrated right now, my order was supposed to arrive yesterday and it still hasn’t shown up! Like, what’s going on??

Dear Support Team, I am encountering an issue with the software that seems to persist despite attempts to resolve it. Various functionalities do not respond as expected, and I'm unable to pinpoint the cause. Any guidance would be appreciated, though I'm unsure what specific information you might require from me.
I can't open the app, it just crashes like every time. idk what’s wrong? reinstalled but no luck.
Hey, I was trying to find info about my subscription but the website's kinda vague. Any chance you could give me a hand?

I thought my order was arriving today but I got an email saying it's delayed? That's really confusing.

Hey, so I got charged for something I didn't even buy. I really need a refund but there's no order number or anything in my email, just my bank statement shows it and I'm super confused. Can you do something about this? It's like, how did that even happen? I've never seen this before.
I've been trying to log into my account for hours, but it just keeps saying my password is wrong. I know I'm using the right one! Can you check what's going on?
I updated my password, but now I can't log in with the new one. Isn't it supposed to work?

So, I ordered this gadget last month but it arrived broken, right? I mean, it seemed like it was working okay at first but then it just stopped outta nowhere. I really don’t want to send it back if I can avoid it, you know? I just want my money back because I feel like I shouldn’t have to deal with this, but at the same time, they said returns are tricky. It seems unfair. Can I just get a refund, please? But also, what if they say that’s not allowed because it’s been more than 30 days? Ugh.

I’ve been waiting forever for my order to arrive, and every time I check the tracking, it says it's still in the same place. Plus, I got this weird email about a shipping issue, but no one seems to know what’s going on. What’s the deal? I really needed this for a party last week and it’s super frustrating!

So, I tried switching my email for my account like, a week ago, but now I can't log in or get any reset links sent to my new address. I mean, I thought it would be smooth, but it’s super frustrating! Can you look into this? I just need access back, please!
I thought I canceled my subscription, but I'm still being charged? Can someone check that for me?
Hey, I was wondering if there's a way to track my order? I didn't see anything in the app.
I ordered a phone last week and it still hasn’t arrived. I’m kinda confused about where it is. Can you check on that?
